CheckTitle: Okta password policies remember at least 5 previous passwords
Description: **Okta Password Policy password history** should remember at least 5 previous passwords in every active policy.
Risk: **Insufficient password history** lets users quickly reuse old passwords, limiting the value of rotations and increasing credential reuse exposure.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: **Set password history to at least 5 previous passwords in every active Okta Password Policy** to reduce immediate password reuse.
